variantNotes: All blocks map to existing block names and style variants. No new block directories needed. Cards (icon) is a CSS style variant within the cards block (not a separate directory). Accordion-faq is a standalone block.

sectionMetadata.reason: Hero block handles its own background image styling (full-width photo). No section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image with centered heading 'When you can't make a car payment, we're here to help' and paragraph with bold phone number 1-800-289-8004
sequences.reason: Full-width background image with text overlay requires hero block structure. Cannot be achieved with default content authoring.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'What you can do' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. The decorative line above is a CSS concern (can be styled via section first-child heading pseudo-element).

sequences.description: Grid of 4 items, each with a small icon (64x64), heading, and short description. Items: Change your payment due date, Defer a payment, Make payment arrangements, Surrender your vehicle
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of items with small icons and text. Matches the Cards (icon) variant which displays small icon images with heading and description text.
sequences.note: Cards (icon) is an existing style variant. In the EDS block table header: 'Cards (icon)'

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Related questions' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Four expandable question-and-answer pairs: 'What happens if I miss a payment or make a late payment?', 'Does a late payment affect my credit?', 'What happens to my vehicle if it gets repossessed?', 'If you repossess my vehicle, can I get it back?'
sequences.reason: Interactive expandable/collapsible FAQ content requires block decoration. Matches the accordion-faq block exactly.

sequences.description: Centered secondary button 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/
sequences.reason: Author types a link. The button styling is applied via CSS to the link (secondary button class).

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Additional resources' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Grid of 3 items, each with small icon (64x64), heading, description, and action link. Items: Financial Health (Learn more), Explore payment options (Let's go), Call us (phone 1-800-289-8004 with hours)
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of items with icons, text, and action links. Uses Cards (icon) variant since these items feature small 64x64 icons. The 'resource' variant hides images entirely which is not appropriate here.
sequences.note: Cards (icon) is the correct variant for icon-based cards. These resource cards include action links in addition to icon + heading + description.

sectionMetadata.reason: Default white background with small text

sequences.description: Footnote '1. Terms and conditions apply. Mobile carrier's message and data rates may apply.' Plus document codes QSR-12052026-8045543.1.1 and LRC-0925
sequences.reason: Author types footnote text as small paragraphs. Standard text content that does not require any block structure.

hero.description: Block with background image and overlaid text content. Structure: picture element for background, then heading and paragraph content.
hero.note: Existing hero block in project. Used for full-width marquee with background image and centered text.

cards (icon).description: Grid of card items. Each row in block table has 2 columns: icon image in col 1, text content (heading + description) in col 2. Style variant 'icon' applies small icon sizing.
cards (icon).note: Existing Cards variant. Block table header: 'Cards (icon)'

cards (icon) for resources.description: Same Cards (icon) structure used for Section 4 resource items. Each row in block table has 2 columns: icon image in col 1, text content (heading + description + CTA link) in col 2. The icon variant correctly displays small 64x64 icons.
cards (icon) for resources.note: Same Cards (icon) variant used in both Section 2 and Section 4. The resource variant is NOT used because it hides images via CSS display:none.

accordion-faq.description: Expandable FAQ items. Each row in block table represents one Q&A pair: question text in col 1, answer text in col 2.

section1.background: Full-width photo of couple in front of house - this is a hero-specific background image, not section styling
section1.layout: Edge-to-edge, no visible section padding - content overlays on image
section1.reason: Background is the hero block's own design (full-width photo with text overlay). Hero blocks typically have intrinsic backgrounds.

metadata.title: Help with car payments and auto loan assistance | Wells Fargo
metadata.description: If you can't make your car payment and need help, reach out to us for assistance with finding out your options.
metadata.keywords: help with car payment, auto payment help, car payment assistance, vehicle payment assistance
